title: RING Protocol Repository
author: Begue, Sol Clara
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains all the files relevant to the RING protocol (Begue et al., 2025), describing the use of the RING software (Del Conte et al., NAR 2024) to generate residue interaction networks from protein structures.
steps_raw: This repository contains all the files relevant to the RING protocol (Begue et al., 2025), describing the use of the RING software (Del Conte et al., NAR 2024) to generate residue interaction networks from protein structures.
